; Martin / based on Mitchell Scott's tocFromSelection.qmd
; SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
; Modified: 2026-04-15T00:00:00Z
; Requires: betterToc.qmd
;
; Phase 1/2 selection UX for internal links:
; - adds a "link to document" affordance to selection popouts
; - reuses betterToc's proven cross-document picker / navigation flow
; - selection-tool / lasso links now also stage a normalized source anchor for an inline page marker
; - glyph/text-selection links still use the phase-1 cross-document flow without source markers

AFFECT [[3197972396468700595]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[10742505294233322867]]
	LOCATE BEFORE [[197082485]]
	INSERT {
		signal linkToDocument
		signal createLinkedNote
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[214642769434]]
		LOCATE BEFORE [[425121728314878811.16765000136167945189.7081261925573]]#[[3012293087768835154]]
		INSERT {
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
				~&5972374&~: linkToDocument
				~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
				~&6504337259&~: ~&214642769434&~.~&6504337259&~
				~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771853950&~
				~&254542236275632405&~: ~&10742505294233322867&~.linkToDocument()
			}
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
				~&5972374&~: createLinkedNote
				~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
				~&6504337259&~: ~&214642769434&~.~&6504337259&~
				~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"5204414324171175596&~
				~&254542236275632405&~: ~&10742505294233322867&~.createLinkedNote()
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[18399528329672988301]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
function selectionSourceAnchor() {
	var selectionItems = ~&8399340108982949229&~.~&5308518110917893541&~(~&8399340108982949229&~.~&15752433948179392809&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~);
	var selectionBounds = null;
	if (~&8399340108982949229&~["getItemBoundingRect"]) {
		selectionBounds = ~&8399340108982949229&~["getItemBoundingRect"](selectionItems);
	}

	var pageBounds = null;
	var sceneController = ~&6504254477&~.controller || null;
	if (sceneController && sceneController.paperNoteBounds
			&& isFinite(sceneController.paperNoteBounds.width)
			&& isFinite(sceneController.paperNoteBounds.height)
			&& sceneController.paperNoteBounds.width > 0
			&& sceneController.paperNoteBounds.height > 0) {
		pageBounds = sceneController.paperNoteBounds;
	} else if (sceneController && sceneController.boundingRect
			&& isFinite(sceneController.boundingRect.width)
			&& isFinite(sceneController.boundingRect.height)
			&& sceneController.boundingRect.width > 0
			&& sceneController.boundingRect.height > 0) {
		pageBounds = sceneController.boundingRect;
	}

	var sourceAnchor = null;
	if (selectionBounds && pageBounds) {
		sourceAnchor = {
			x: (Number(selectionBounds.x) - Number(pageBounds.x)) / Number(pageBounds.width),
			y: (Number(selectionBounds.y) - Number(pageBounds.y)) / Number(pageBounds.height),
			w: Number(selectionBounds.width) / Number(pageBounds.width),
			h: Number(selectionBounds.height) / Number(pageBounds.height),
			space: "page"
		};
	} else if (selectionBounds && ~&6504254477&~.width > 0 && ~&6504254477&~.height > 0) {
		sourceAnchor = {
			x: Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(selectionBounds.x) / ~&6504254477&~.width)),
			y: Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(selectionBounds.y) / ~&6504254477&~.height)),
			w: Math.max(0.02, Math.min(1, Number(selectionBounds.width) / ~&6504254477&~.width)),
			h: Math.max(0.02, Math.min(1, Number(selectionBounds.height) / ~&6504254477&~.height)),
			space: "view"
		};
	}

	console.log("doc-links selection",
		"items=" + (selectionItems && selectionItems.length !== undefined ? selectionItems.length : "na"),
		"bounds=" + (selectionBounds ? [selectionBounds.x, selectionBounds.y, selectionBounds.width, selectionBounds.height].join(",") : "null"),
		"pageBounds=" + (pageBounds ? [pageBounds.x, pageBounds.y, pageBounds.width, pageBounds.height].join(",") : "null"),
		"view=" + [~&6504254477&~.width, ~&6504254477&~.height].join(","),
		"anchorSpace=" + (sourceAnchor ? sourceAnchor.space : "null"),
		"anchor=" + (sourceAnchor ? [sourceAnchor.x, sourceAnchor.y, sourceAnchor.w, sourceAnchor.h].join(",") : "null"));

	return sourceAnchor;
}

onLinkToDocument: {
	~&6504254477&~.~&7282468819357443632&~(function () {
		~&15793094956877902211&~.tocStartCrossDocSelection(selectionSourceAnchor());
		~&6504254477&~.~&12148339614529610933&~();
	});
}

onCreateLinkedNote: {
	~&6504254477&~.~&7282468819357443632&~(function () {
		~&15793094956877902211&~.tocCreateLinkedNotebook(selectionSourceAnchor());
		~&6504254477&~.~&12148339614529610933&~();
	});
}
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[2170432337220872387]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[10742505294233132260]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
	~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
		~&5972374&~: glyphSelectionLinkToDocument
		~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
		~&6504337259&~: ~&10742505294233132260&~.~&6504337259&~
		~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771853950&~
		~&254542236275632405&~: {
			~&15793094956877902211&~.tocStartCrossDocSelection();
		}
	}
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[3708437855669237819]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[738928733275563153]] > [[12395602925408354507]]
LOCATE AFTER [[16513464771895549213]]#[[496330270324752866]]
INSERT {
	~&16513464771895549213&~ {
		~&5972374&~: textSelectionLinkToDocument
		~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771853950&~
		~&233748328658231&~: ~&8399340108982949229&~.~&15974515710717949451&~
		~&7713561545874130&~: ~&214625660372&~
		~&254542236275632405&~: {
			~&15793094956877902211&~.tocStartCrossDocSelection();
		}
	}
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
